name: Savory Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat oil over medium-high heat.
2. Coat the beef chunks with flour, then add to the oil and cook, turning occasionally, until browned. Remove and set aside.
3. Add the remaining 6 ingredients (parsnips, celery, onion, beef broth, thyme, salt) to the saucepan and sauté for 5 minutes.
4. Return the beef to the saucepan.
5. Add tomatoes, turnips, carrot, garlic, red wine, rosemary, and succotash. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until the meat is tender, about 45 minutes.
7. Stir in pepper. Cook until heated through.
8. Serve over rice or noodles.
This recipe was shared by Robert Rostrup.
